In accordance with Section 4.4 of the Zoning and Development By-law, your request is granted, thereby permitting exterior alterations to this existing Multiple Dwelling "Multiplex" with a three-storey 2-unit front building and a two-storey 2-unit rear building with five surface parking spaces having vehicular access from the lane.

1) Building#1 South elevation material #2 note revised to combustible material
2) Buiding #1 and #2 flat roof fascias material #7 note clarification of "metal cap flashing over composite panel fascia"
3) Building#2 South, east and west elevation material #2 revised to material #3 (composite combustible vertical siding to non-combustible composite panel).
4) Building #1 east and west elevations roof deck guard revised from glass to pony wall for privacy.

As shown on Drawings DP301, DP310, DP510 and DP511, submitted by Carman Kwan "RECEIVED" by this Department on June 06, 2025, and now approved as a Minor Amendment to Development Permit Number DP-2024-00400.

description:
In accordance with Section 4.4 of the Zoning and Development By-law, your request is granted, thereby permitting alterations to your Multiple Dwelling "Multiplex" with a three-storey two-unit front building and a two-storey one-unit rear building with three surface parking spaces having vehicular access from the lane.

M/A to DP-2024-00479:

Front unit (475):
1) Attic floor layout has been revised and floor area increased
2) Dormer sizes reduced on both sides of house, east and west elevations
3) Windows removed and size changes on third storey
4) Elevations revised
5) Main slope roof pitch changed to 12/12
6) Roof peak height changed to 236.07' (35.67')
7) Floor area reduced on main floor

Rear unit (477):
1) Building depth changed to 37.42'
2) Second floor layout revised
3) Asphalt shingle roof proposed
4) Hardie shingles proposed on exterior walls
5) 3rd parking pad proposed in the rear yard
6) New concrete 3'ft. wide concrete walkway proposed in the rear east side yard
7) Floor area calculation revised on each floor
8) Mechanical room layout revised with new locations for HRV, electric boiler and electric HWT on the main floor
9) En-suites x2 layouts revised on the second floor
10) Window size changes on the main and second floors
11) Driveway width increased in rear yard
12) Electrical closet removed in rear yard
13) PMT removed. BC hydro overhead confirmation/approval correspondence provided.

As shown on Drawings (A001, A002, A003, A004, A005, A006, A007, A009, A010, A011, and A012), submitted by (Asghar Ali, Agent for Owner) "RECEIVED" by this Department on (May 15th, 2025) and now approved as a Minor Amendment to Development Permit Number DP-2024-00479.
